meta.title: Booking by John — Freight Brokerage & Ocean Freight from Vietnam
meta.description: Freight broker Vietnam. Ocean freight VNSGN to Europe & South America. Courier Vietnam worldwide. Vetted carriers, real-time visibility, 2-hour quote SLA.
meta.ogTitle: Booking by John — Freight Brokerage & Ocean Freight from Vietnam
meta.ogDescription: No runaround, no generic quotes. Vetted carriers, real-time visibility, and a broker who picks up the phone.

hero.heading: Your cargo is revenue.
hero.subheading: No runaround, no generic quotes. Vetted carriers, real-time visibility, and a broker who picks up the phone.

ftl.title: Full Truckload (FTL)
ftl.description: Dedicated capacity for loads 10K+ lbs. Direct, no stops, fast transit.

ltl.title: LTL
ltl.description: Cost-efficient for palletized freight under 10K lbs with flexible pickup.

drayage.title: Drayage
drayage.description: Port-to-warehouse container moves. Chassis management included.

intermodal.title: Intermodal
intermodal.description: Rail + truck combo for long-haul savings without sacrificing reliability.

expedited.title: Expedited
expedited.description: Hot shots, team drivers, air freight. When it absolutely can't wait.

courier.title: Courier — VN to World
courier.description: Authorized agent for UPS, DHL, and FedEx in Vietnam. Fast, door-to-door delivery worldwide.

ocean.title: Ocean Freight
ocean.description: From/to Vietnam to the world. Competitive rates with suitable schedules for your shipment.

carrierVetting.title: Carrier Vetting
carrierVetting.detail: FMCSA clearance, $1M+ cargo insurance, safety score monitoring, no double-brokering.

liveTracking.title: Live Tracking
liveTracking.detail: GPS pings every 15 min, proactive check-call updates.

quoteSla.title: 2-Hour Quote SLA
quoteSla.detail: Standard lanes within 2 hours; complex lanes same-day.

claims.title: Claims Under 0.5%
claims.detail: Full claims support, resolution typically under 30 days.

oneContact.title: One Point of Contact
oneContact.detail: Named rep with direct line, knows your lanes and preferences.

stepper.heading: Send me the details — I'll handle the rest.

step1.heading: What type of move?
step1.subheading: Select the mode that best fits. Not sure? Pick "Other" and we'll sort it out.

step2.heading: Where's it going?
step2.subheading: City or ZIP is fine — we'll confirm the details on our call.
step2.errorOriginDestination: Please enter at least an origin or destination.

step3.heading: How soon does it need to move?
step3.subheading: This helps me prioritize and find the best rate match.

step4.heading: How do I reach you?
step4.subheading: Mr. John will follow up personally — no bots, no auto-emails.
step4.errorContactRequired: Please enter your name and at least one way to reach you.

success.title: Request received — John's on it.
success.body: Expect a personal follow-up within 2 hours during business hours. For urgent requests, call directly: {phone}

error.generic: Something went wrong. Please call Mr. John directly at {phone}

trickyShipment.heading: Got a tricky shipment?
trickyShipment.body: Oversized, hazmat, multi-stop, cross-border — the harder it is, the more you need someone who's done it before. Let's figure it out together.

footer.tagline: Freight brokerage & ocean freight from Vietnam.
footer.copyright: © {year} Booking by John. All rights reserved.
